ambiguities.aspect: Bond issuance at discount with stated market rate
ambiguities.input_contextualized_conventional_defaul: 'issued' bonds with stated face value, coupon rate, term, and market rate provides all inputs needed for PV calculation of proceeds
ambiguities.input_contextualized_ifrs_default: IFRS 9 requires financial liabilities to be initially measured at fair value (PV of cash flows at market rate); effective interest method applies for subsequent measurement

flags.aspect: Present value calculation for bond proceeds

best_attempt.reason: Bond issued at discount requires PV calculation: PV of principal ($3,000,000 at 15% for 3 years) + PV of annuity ($300,000 annual coupon at 15% for 3 years); downstream calculator will compute exact proceeds

output_decision_maker.proceed_reason: Transaction provides all necessary inputs (face value, coupon rate, term, market rate) for the downstream calculator to compute bond proceeds at discount.
output_decision_maker.overall_final_rationale: All inputs for the bond issuance calculation are stated (face value $3,000,000, coupon 10%, term 3 years, market rate 15%), and the downstream calculator can compute the exact proceeds using PV formulas.
